title: Talk:Reactions to the 2026 Iran war
wikitext:
{{Talk header}} {{WikiProject banner shell |1= {{WikiProject Iran |importance=Low}} {{WikiProject Military history|US=yes|Middle-Eastern=yes|Post-Cold-War=yes|Balkan=yes|Chinese=yes|Japanese=yes|b1=no|b2=no|b3=yes|b4=yes|b5=yes}} |class=Start}} {{old move|date=1 March 2026|destination=Reactions to 2026 Iran war|result=Clear consensus in opposition|link=Special:Permalink/1341831302#Requested move 4 March 2026}} == Requested move 4 March 2026 ==
:''The following is a closed discussion of a [[Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]. '''Please do not modify it.''' Subsequent comments should be made in a new section on the talk page. Editors desiring to contest the closing decision should consider a [[Wikipedia:move review|move review]] {{strong|after}} discussing it on the closer's talk page. No further edits should be made to this discussion.'' The result of the move request was: '''Clear consensus in opposition.''' I will respect this user's usage of [[WP:BOLD]] as that is clear within their right to suggest this move. However, there is a clear consensus that agree with my statement that doing the title change would be grammatically incorrect. ([[Wikipedia:Requested moves/Closing instructions#Non-admin closure|non-admin closure]]) [[User:GuesanLoyalist|GuesanLoyalist]] ([[User talk:GuesanLoyalist|talk]]) 09:16, 5 March 2026 (UTC) ---- [[:Reactions to the 2026 Iran war]] → {{no redirect|Reactions to 2026 Iran war}} – per [[WP:NCTHE]] [[User:AnthonyTheGuy|AnthonyTheGuy]] ([[User talk:AnthonyTheGuy|talk]]) 23:27, 1 March 2026 (UTC) :'''Oppose''' - as per quoted {{xt|Not all of the Wikipedia article names which belong to these categories meet the above-listed conditions. For instance, Mona Lisa is the name of a work of art, and Eurythmics is the name of a musical band, but neither includes a definite or indefinite article.}} and would be grammatically incorrect to do so. [[User:GuesanLoyalist|GuesanLoyalist]] ([[User talk:GuesanLoyalist|talk]]) 01:53, 5 March 2026 (UTC) :Note: [[Wikipedia talk:WikiProject Military history|WikiProject Military history]], [[Wikipedia talk:WikiProject Military history/Post-Cold War task force|WikiProject Military history/Post-Cold War task force]], and [[Wikipedia talk:WikiProject Iran|WikiProject Iran]] have been notified of this discussion. [[User:GuesanLoyalist|GuesanLoyalist]] ([[User talk:GuesanLoyalist|talk]]) 01:54, 5 March 2026 (UTC) ::Comment: Remarks explaining oppose comment appear to be in support of dropping the article from the existing name. Unless I am reading this wrong? [[User:Donner60|Donner60]] ([[User talk:Donner60|talk]]) 03:12, 5 March 2026 (UTC) :::Summary: I would like to keep the title {{xt|Reactions to the 2026 Iran war}} and keep the {{xt|the}} rather then change it to {{!xt|Reactions to 2026 Iran war}} [[User:GuesanLoyalist|GuesanLoyalist]] ([[User talk:GuesanLoyalist|talk]]) 03:43, 5 March 2026 (UTC) ::::Thanks. It looks like I misinterpreted your comment. However, it may be just as well that my comment led you made clear your position so that other readers or commenters do not make the same interpretation that I did. [[User:Donner60|Donner60]] ([[User talk:Donner60|talk]]) 05:29, 5 March 2026 (UTC) :::::yeah don't worry about your misinterpretation, everybody does that all the time :-) and thank '''''YOU''''' for making me add that clarification as well so that users could still understand my comment properly. [[User:GuesanLoyalist|GuesanLoyalist]] ([[User talk:GuesanLoyalist|talk]]) 05:48, 5 March 2026 (UTC) :'''Oppose and SNOW close''', agree with @[[User:GuesanLoyalist|GuesanLoyalist]]'s intrepretations [[User:4-RAZOR 01|4-RΔ𝚉🌑R-01𝕏 ]] ([[User talk:4-RAZOR 01|talk]]) 07:03, 5 March 2026 (UTC) :'''Oppose''' per above; would be grammatically incorrect.--[[User:Ronnnaldo7|Ronnnaldo7]] ([[User talk:Ronnnaldo7|talk]]) 07:35, 5 March 2026 (UTC)
The discussion above is closed. Please do not modify it. Subsequent comments should be made on the appropriate discussion page. No further edits should be made to this discussion.
== Extended-confirmed-protected edit request on 3 March 2026 == {{edit extended-protected|Reactions to the 2026 Iran conflict|answered=yes}} * {{flag|Vietnam}}The Vietnamese Ministry of Foreign Affairs condemned these mutual military demonstrations and called on all parties to exercise restraint. You should add it to the main post. Link : https://vnexpress.net/viet-nam-keu-goi-cham-dut-ngay-hanh-dong-leo-thang-o-trung-dong-5045131.html }} [[User:Nguyễn Quốc Anh (1248)|Nguyễn Quốc Anh (1248)]] ([[User talk:Nguyễn Quốc Anh (1248)|talk]]) 03:22, 3 March 2026 (UTC) :{{already done}} Vietnam is mentioned in the ''Others'' section. [[User:9ninety|9ninety]] ([[User talk:9ninety|talk]]) 17:53, 3 March 2026 (UTC) ::thank you. [[User:Nguyễn Quốc Anh (1248)|Nguyễn Quốc Anh (1248)]] ([[User talk:Nguyễn Quốc Anh (1248)|talk]]) 04:05, 4 March 2026 (UTC) == Add stance on using US bases to International == For European and some other nearby countries, if not already done, add their current stance on the US using their military bases for example Spain has denied the US access on the grounds that it violates the UN Charter, specific source https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/live/cy0dp1l57nxt?post=asset%3A525e1c73-62c7-4152-93a8-198b1fa8e1ed#post [[User:Alimsts|Alimsts]] ([[User talk:Alimsts|talk]]) 07:29, 3 March 2026 (UTC) == Grammatical errors == There are many grammatical errors, please fix them. [[Special:Contributions/~2026-10111-9|~2026-10111-9]] ([[User talk:~2026-10111-9|talk]]) 10:11, 3 March 2026 (UTC) :Also noticed some glaring spelling errors in the Non state part. [[Special:Contributions/~2026-13828-28|~2026-13828-28]] ([[User talk:~2026-13828-28|talk]]) 14:11, 3 March 2026 (UTC) == World Map == This page should have a world map with each nation stances.[[User:Muaza Husni|Muaza Husni]] ([[User talk:Muaza Husni|talk]]) 10:34, 3 March 2026 (UTC) :we can create that following a UN Resolution [[User:4-RAZOR 01|4-RΔ𝚉🌑R-01𝕏 ]] ([[User talk:4-RAZOR 01|talk]]) 10:45, 3 March 2026 (UTC) :I actually just added one last night. [[User:Josstiyn|Josstiyn]] ([[User talk:Josstiyn|talk]]) 18:55, 4 March 2026 (UTC) ::Thanks buddy! [[User:4-RAZOR 01|4-RΔ𝚉🌑R-01𝕏 ]] ([[User talk:4-RAZOR 01|talk]]) 19:07, 4 March 2026 (UTC) == Paragraphs == Can we convert this Flag Salad Bullet point list into nice and easy paragraphs? [[User:4-RAZOR 01|4-RΔ𝚉🌑R-01𝕏 ]] ([[User talk:4-RAZOR 01|talk]]) 10:45, 3 March 2026 (UTC) == Defense Agreement Correction == The reference is referring to the Saudi mutual defense agreement with Pakistan signed in September, not a non-existent Saudi-Iranian agreement. [[Special:Contributions/~2026-13810-30|~2026-13810-30]] ([[User talk:~2026-13810-30|talk]]) 16:00, 3 March 2026 (UTC) == Others section == Would it make sense to include countries which gave condolences for the death of Khamenei like [https://news.am/rus/news/933414.html Armenia], [https://www.turkiyetoday.com/region/erdogan-saddened-by-khameneis-death-says-turkiyes-efforts-will-continue-3215404 Turkey] or [https://caspianpost.com/azerbaijan/azerbaijan-s-president-extends-condolences-to-iranian-counterpart-over-khamenei-s-death Azerbaijan] [[User:Braganza|Braganza]] ([[User talk:Braganza|talk]]) 16:32, 3 March 2026 (UTC) :@[[User:4-RAZOR 01|4-RAZOR 01]] why are none of them here [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Assassination_of_Ali_Khamenei&diff=prev&oldid=1341438506] [[User:Braganza|Braganza]] ([[User talk:Braganza|talk]]) 07:17, 4 March 2026 (UTC) ::They are there in the latest revision, i had briefly moved them over to reactions page for 2026 iran war. [[User:4-RAZOR 01|4-RΔ𝚉🌑R-01𝕏 ]] ([[User talk:4-RAZOR 01|talk]]) 08:14, 4 March 2026 (UTC) ::Hang on it seems to have been removed. Let me add them back [[User:4-RAZOR 01|4-RΔ𝚉🌑R-01𝕏 ]] ([[User talk:4-RAZOR 01|talk]]) 08:16, 4 March 2026 (UTC) == Add Hamas reaction to Palestine section == While the [[Palestine]] section should continue to reference the [[Palestinian Authority|PA]]'s comments, it should also reference the reaction by [[Hamas]] (https://english.almayadeen.net/news/politics/hamas-condemns-attack-on-iran--voices-solidarity-with-ir) [[User:Am i talkin to me|Am i talkin to me]] ([[User talk:Am i talkin to me|talk]]) 22:32, 3 March 2026 (UTC) :Isnt Hamas usually put in a separate section because they arent the internationally recognized governement? [[User:Colonel IbnZbohk|Colonel IbnZbohk]] ([[User talk:Colonel IbnZbohk|talk]]) 20:22, 5 March 2026 (UTC) == Remove unsubstantiated claim on Japan's position == {{edit extended-protected|Reactions to the 2026 Iran conflict|answered=yes}} Remove the sentence "On 1 March, he announced that the government "as a whole" supported the American and Israeli attack." from the Japan section of the page as no source is cited and I have been unable to find a source for the claim of Koizumi or another Japanese government official claiming to support the attacks in general or "as a whole" [[Special:Contributions/~2026-13443-76|~2026-13443-76]] ([[User talk:~2026-13443-76|talk]]) 08:18, 4 March 2026 (UTC) :{{done}} Thank you for pointing it out. --🔥[[User:Komonzia|Komonzia]] ([[User talk:Komonzia|message]]) 16:43, 4 March 2026 (UTC) == Swiss reaction == See: https://www.swissinfo.ch/fre/l%27iran-salue-la-position-suisse-%22plus-forte%22-que-les-europ%c3%a9ens/91031346 I wonder if it's worth putting it in the Europe section or in "Other"? I think it's a bit more major than "Other" because Switzerland was involved in negotiations before. But it's not a very interesting response on its own. 🔥[[User:Komonzia|Komonzia]] ([[User talk:Komonzia|message]]) 08:55, 4 March 2026 (UTC) :I just added the reaction to the map, thanks! [[User:Josstiyn|Josstiyn]] ([[User talk:Josstiyn|talk]]) 23:05, 4 March 2026 (UTC) == Pakistan is wrong on map == Article states; "Pakistan's Foreign Minister condemned the Israeli and American strikes on Iran. He also stated he reminded Iran of the mutual defense agreement they signed with Saudi Arabia in September 2025." Map has Pakistan marked red indicating "Countries that condemned the Iranian attacks" [[User:Salmon Of Ignorance|Salmon Of Ignorance]] ([[User talk:Salmon Of Ignorance|talk]]) 11:14, 4 March 2026 (UTC) :That's one for @[[User:Josstiyn|Josstiyn]] (although it should be an SVG map). 🔥[[User:Komonzia|Komonzia]] ([[User talk:Komonzia|message]]) 14:43, 4 March 2026 (UTC) :I just fixed the mistake and shaded Pakistan as blue, thanks for letting me know! [[User:Josstiyn|Josstiyn]] ([[User talk:Josstiyn|talk]]) 19:09, 4 March 2026 (UTC) ::Thanks @[[User:Josstiyn|Josstiyn]][[User:Salmon Of Ignorance|Salmon Of Ignorance]] ([[User talk:Salmon Of Ignorance|talk]]) 08:28, 5 March 2026 (UTC) == Denmark UN condemnation of Iran activities == Hello- I suggets to change the color of Denmark on the global map, as DK condemned the Iranian activities explicitly Feb 28th 2026: https://dkonunsc.dk/statements/28-02-2026-statement-for-unsc-briefing-on-the-situation-in-the-middle-east Thanks Rotem [[User:רותםכהן646|רותםכהן646]] ([[User talk:רותםכהן646|talk]]) 19:46, 4 March 2026 (UTC) :I just changed it, thanks! [[User:Josstiyn|Josstiyn]] ([[User talk:Josstiyn|talk]]) 22:59, 4 March 2026 (UTC) == Mexico's position == Mexico's urge for peace and prevail of diplomatic routes is mentioned here https://www.univision.com/noticias/america-latina/sheinbaum-fija-postura-de-mexico-ante-ataques-de-eeuu-e-israel-contra-iran [[Special:Contributions/~2026-14141-91|~2026-14141-91]] ([[User talk:~2026-14141-91|talk]]) 05:17, 5 March 2026 (UTC) == Poland's position == Hi, according to gov.pl, Poland condemned the Iranian attacks. I belive this should be marked in world map with red color. Additionally, this should be mentioned in the section International / States / Europe / Poland. Source: https://www.gov.pl/web/dyplomacja/oswiadczenie-msz-dot-iranskich-atakow-na-kraje-rady-wspolpracy-zatoki-perskiej [[Special:Contributions/~2026-14168-77|~2026-14168-77]] ([[User talk:~2026-14168-77|talk]]) 12:35, 5 March 2026 (UTC) == Legal assessment? == Should there be also a dedicated chapter covering Legal assessment. And include info like the UN have called both US and Israeli strikes as illegal and violate UN Charter as well as Iran's retaliatory strikes. And other legal experts. I think people are curious about legality of the entire conflict and plenty of prominent lawyers from former state department are weighing in.[https://www.ohchr.org/en/statements-and-speeches/2026/03/statement-independent-international-fact-finding-mission-islamic#:~:text=condemns%20the%20strikes%20against%20Iran%20by%20Israel,which%20were%20followed%20by%20Iran's%20retaliatory%20strikes][https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/live/2026/mar/04/donald-trump-pete-hegseth-iran-james-talarico-primaries-midterms-immigration-minnesota-latest-news-updates?filterKeyEvents=false&page=with%3Ablock-69a861148f081f92ec616a58] [[User:JaredMcKenzie|JaredMcKenzie]] ([[User talk:JaredMcKenzie|talk]]) 14:06, 5 March 2026 (UTC) == Algerian reaction == I was actually surprised how nothing in this page was talking about the Algerian reaction to the war. It's actually really important, as Algeria has a lot of oil and gas so economically it could help them, and also, Algeria started taking its distances with Iran, despite Algeria being a pretty close ally to Iran and probably it's closest ally in Africa. [[User:Colonel IbnZbohk|Colonel IbnZbohk]] ([[User talk:Colonel IbnZbohk|talk]]) 20:19, 5 March 2026 (UTC) :Here are the sources :https://www.lejdd.fr/International/iran-lalgerie-se-desolidarise-timidement-du-regime-des-mollahs-167817 :https://www.lepoint.fr/monde/conflit-au-moyen-orient-pourquoi-lalgerie-evite-de-choisir-son-camp-7NF4BCBEXFDUHAJF2ZJY5U56GM/ :https://www.courrierinternational.com/article/economie-la-guerre-en-iran-une-aubaine-pour-l-algerie_241279 [[User:Colonel IbnZbohk|Colonel IbnZbohk]] ([[User talk:Colonel IbnZbohk|talk]]) 20:21, 5 March 2026 (UTC)

sections.line: Add stance on using US bases to International
Add Hamas reaction to Palestine section
Remove unsubstantiated claim on Japan's position
Denmark UN condemnation of Iran activities
